description: Parking structures — lighting dominant, very predictable commuter patterns.

behavioral_rules.name: Commuter Double-Peak Pattern
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Confirm ventilation fans track occupancy sensor data.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Classic commuter pattern — morning and evening peaks confirmed.

behavioral_rules.name: Overnight Lighting Base Load
behavioral_rules.description: Overnight (23:00-05:00) load should be <20% of peak — mostly security lighting.
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Motion-activated lighting can reduce overnight load by 60-70%.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Parking overnight lighting: {value:.0%} of peak — motion sensors recommended.

behavioral_rules.name: Weekend Consumption Anomaly
behavioral_rules.description: Weekend usage should be <60% of weekday usage for this building type.
behavioral_rules.recommendation: Review weekend HVAC schedules and unoccupied equipment.
behavioral_rules.demo_alert: Weekend usage is {value}% of weekday — expected <{threshold_pct}%.

efficiency_rules.name: Ventilation Over-Run Detection
efficiency_rules.description: Ventilation running >2h after peak occupancy is inefficient.
efficiency_rules.recommendation: CO2-linked ventilation control eliminates idle fan run-time.
efficiency_rules.demo_alert: Ventilation fans running {value}h after occupancy peak — CO2 sensors recommended.

weather_sensitivity_rules.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
weather_sensitivity_rules.description: Correlation between air_temperature and meter_reading reveals cooling/heating dependency.
weather_sensitivity_rules.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.
weather_sensitivity_rules.demo_alert: Energy use is {value:.0%} correlated with outdoor temperature.

alert_rules.name: High Consumption During Low-Occupancy Hours
alert_rules.description: Consumption from 23:00-05:00 exceeds 20% of daily average.
alert_rules.recommendation: Configure occupancy sensors and timer-based shutdowns.
alert_rules.demo_alert: Significant energy consumed when building should be empty ({value:.0%} of daily avg).
